title: Near Miss - Unsecured Load on Hoist
description: Material hoist platform at floor 12 had improperly secured pallet of drywall sheets. Load shifted during ascent but remained on platform. Platform stopped immediately. No workers in path. Load secured before resuming operations.
location: Second Street Mixed-Use Tower - Floor 12 Hoist

title: First Aid - Hand Laceration from Sheet Metal
description: Iron worker sustained 1.5-inch laceration on right hand from sheet metal edge during HVAC duct installation at floor 8. First aid applied on site. No stitches required. Returned to modified duty.

title: Near Miss - Overhead Work Zone Violation
description: During caisson drilling operations a subcontractor's delivery driver walked under active crane boom without authorization. Driver did not observe exclusion zone signage. No injury occurred.
location: Brickell Bay Hotel - North Caisson Area

title: Recordable Injury - Ankle Sprain
description: Ironworker stepped into uncovered floor sleeve opening and sprained right ankle. Required off-site medical treatment and 4 days restricted duty. Opening had cover removed but not replaced by plumber prior to incident.
